name: Editor hunk workflow
objective: Make hunk review state daemon-derived and cross-client consumable without mutating the durable WorkspaceChangeRecord encoding.
scope: derive accept/reject availability for proposed and approval-pending hunks
derive rollback availability for applied hunks
detect stale hunks when current workspace content no longer matches recorded hunk material
expose derived review state through the runtime bridge inspect contract
nonGoals: no GUI hunk review closure in this support slice
no change to persisted WorkspaceChangeRecord SCALE layout
